overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through dark, stormy ocean waters at night. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar, chart plotter, and depth sounder, with a brief lightning flash illuminating the water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward ocean view

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while moving steadily through dark waters, monitoring the radar and chart displays

entered.detail: navigation display showing colored chart data with red hatched patterns on the left side of the bridge console
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep and concentric range rings mounted centrally above the forward windows
blue-screen depth monitor showing underwater terrain profile on the right side of the console
red-painted bow deck of the vessel with metal railings and deck equipment visible through the forward windows
dark choppy sea surface extending to the horizon with subtle wave movement

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving through dark ocean waters at night. Navigation displays including a chart plotter, rotating radar, and depth sounder are visible overhead, while the ship's bow cuts through the water ahead. The scene is illuminated only by the ship's interior instrument panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge during storm conditions with lightning

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface outside the bridge windows, briefly revealing the water texture and horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the ship through stormy waters, maintaining course while monitoring instruments as lightning strikes nearby

segments.scene_description: The ship continues its steady progression through the stormy night sea. A sudden lightning flash at the beginning of this segment briefly illuminates the ocean surface with bright white light before returning to darkness. The navigation displays remain active with the radar continuing its rotation as the vessel maintains its forward course.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates a dark, stormy ocean under the glow of instrument panels. It begins with the vessel cutting through black waters, where the only light emanates from the overhead navigation displays, including a rotating radar, chart plotter, and depth sounder. As the ship maintains its steady forward course, the oppressive darkness is suddenly interrupted by a bright white flash of lightning that momentarily illuminates the churning ocean surface. The scene then shifts back into deep shadow, leaving the active electronic displays to guide the vessel as it continues its progression through the night sea.
